calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Robert Gelott in propria persona
*The case came on regularly as scheduled for hearing today. The Court grants decree changing the petitioner's name to Robert Gigliotti. The decree is signed in open court. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris, Clerks: P. Dias/Dianne Boffi, Reporter: La Von Granger
